highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 2.88.3 adds .NET 7 support for the Blazor views and picks up build fixes.

bullets.detail: Build infrastructure and the Blazor views now target .NET 7, and Emscripten builds regenerate against 3.1.12 with SIMD features enabled.
A hook lets .NET consumers intercept and capture GL calls, which is useful for diagnostics and custom render pipelines.

bullets.lead: Skipping past data no longer allocates
bullets.detail: A stream skip is now implemented as a read into a null buffer, avoiding a spurious allocation on the fast path.
The native loader now passes `RTLD_DEEPBIND` when opening the library, so symbols resolve within SkiaSharp's own module first on Linux hosts that mix incompatible native libraries.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: Regenerated the Emscripten bindings against 3.1.12 and enabled SIMD features
contributor_summaries.snnz: Added the `RTLD_DEEPBIND` flag to the Linux native loader

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 2.8.2.3 picks up the .NET 7 build infrastructure alongside the SkiaSharp bindings.
